preservation_note: Faithful transcription of the owner's countersignature (issued 2026-07-17) into a committed, byte-bound governance artifact. Separate artifact by rule — it is NOT appended to the design draft, whose bytes are bound below. This countersign commit is necessarily one commit AFTER the design commit it binds (Option A external binding; a commit cannot contain the hash of the commit that contains it).

bound_design_commit.verification: Read directly at the exact commit SHA; the final commit is exactly one commit ahead of the stated parent and changes only the eligibility-status mapping and the evidence-binding manifest.

countersigned_design.fallback_trigger: only a registered NUMERICAL_STATUS_NONQUALIFICATION or CERTIFICATE_NONQUALIFICATION

supersession: This countersignature prospectively supersedes the 2026-07-12 raw-first/T-scaled-only implementation authority for the successor DESIGN ONLY. It does NOT validate or ratify the quarantined 2026-07-13 execution, its population, row dispositions, certificates, or AMENDED PASS.
execution_precondition: Before execution, the SEPARATE execution countersignature must bind the finalized implementation, complete eligibility fixtures, source manifest, image digest, runtime configuration, regenerated population protocol, and clean-run stop gates.
